name: Emma
meaning: From the Germanic ermen, meaning "whole" or "universal."

name: Olivia
meaning: From the Latin oliva, "olive" — a symbol of peace, popularized by Shakespeare.

name: Sophia
meaning: From the Greek sophia, meaning "wisdom."

name: Isabella
meaning: A Latinized form of Elizabeth, meaning "God is my oath."

name: Ava
meaning: Possibly from the Latin avis, "bird," or a variant of Eve, "life."

name: Mia
meaning: A short form of Maria; in Italian and Spanish it also means "mine."

name: Amelia
meaning: From the Germanic amal, meaning "work" — connoting industriousness.

name: Charlotte
meaning: A feminine form of Charles, meaning "free man."

name: Evelyn
meaning: From a Norman French surname; popularly linked to "wished-for child."

name: Harper
meaning: An occupational surname meaning "harp player."

name: Abigail
meaning: From the Hebrew Avigail, meaning "my father's joy."

name: Emily
meaning: From the Roman family name Aemilius, meaning "rival" or "eager."

name: Ella
meaning: From the Germanic alia, "other," or a short form of Eleanor.

name: Elizabeth
meaning: From the Hebrew Elisheva, meaning "God is my oath."

name: Scarlett
meaning: An occupational surname for a dyer or seller of scarlet cloth.

name: Grace
meaning: From the Latin gratia, meaning "grace" or "favor."

name: Chloe
meaning: From the Greek chloe, "young green shoot" — an epithet of the goddess Demeter.

name: Victoria
meaning: From the Latin victoria, meaning "victory."

name: Lily
meaning: From the flower, a symbol of purity and innocence.

name: Hannah
meaning: From the Hebrew Channah, meaning "grace" or "favor."

name: Zoe
meaning: From the Greek zoe, meaning "life."

name: Nora
meaning: A short form of Honora, from the Latin honor, "honor."

name: Hazel
meaning: From the hazel tree; a nature name popular since the Victorian era.

name: Violet
meaning: From the flower, via the Latin viola.

name: Aurora
meaning: From the Latin aurora, "dawn" — the Roman goddess of the dawn.

name: Liam
meaning: An Irish short form of William, meaning "resolute protector."

name: Noah
meaning: From the Hebrew Noach, meaning "rest" or "comfort."

name: Oliver
meaning: Linked to the Latin oliva, "olive tree," a symbol of peace.

name: James
meaning: A form of Jacob, meaning "supplanter" or "one who follows."

name: William
meaning: From the Germanic wil (will) and helm (helmet): "resolute protector."

name: Elijah
meaning: From the Hebrew Eliyahu, meaning "my God is Yahweh."

name: Benjamin
meaning: From the Hebrew Binyamin, meaning "son of the right hand."

name: Lucas
meaning: From Lucas, "man from Lucania"; related to the Latin lux, "light."

name: Henry
meaning: From the Germanic heim (home) and ric (ruler): "home ruler."

name: Theodore
meaning: From the Greek Theodoros, meaning "gift of God."

name: Jack
meaning: A medieval English diminutive of John, meaning "God is gracious."

name: Alexander
meaning: From the Greek Alexandros, meaning "defender of the people."

name: Daniel
meaning: From the Hebrew Daniyyel, meaning "God is my judge."

name: Michael
meaning: From the Hebrew Mikha'el, meaning "who is like God?"

name: Samuel
meaning: From the Hebrew Shemu'el, meaning "God has heard."

name: Sebastian
meaning: From Sebastianos, "from Sebaste," a city whose name means "venerable."

name: Ethan
meaning: From the Hebrew Eitan, meaning "strong" or "enduring."

name: Owen
meaning: From the Welsh Owain, possibly "young warrior" or "well-born."

name: Jacob
meaning: From the Hebrew Ya'aqov, meaning "supplanter" or "holder of the heel."

name: John
meaning: From the Hebrew Yochanan, meaning "God is gracious."

name: David
meaning: From the Hebrew David, meaning "beloved."

name: Joseph
meaning: From the Hebrew Yosef, meaning "he will add" or "God increases."

name: Gabriel
meaning: From the Hebrew Gavri'el, meaning "God is my strength."

name: Leo
meaning: From the Latin leo, meaning "lion."

name: Isaac
meaning: From the Hebrew Yitzhak, meaning "he will laugh."

name: Adam
meaning: From the Hebrew adam, meaning "man," related to adamah, "earth."

name: Thomas
meaning: From the Aramaic ta'oma, meaning "twin."

name: Nathan
meaning: From the Hebrew Natan, meaning "he gave" — a gift.

name: Anna
meaning: A form of Hannah, meaning "grace" or "favor."

name: Sarah
meaning: From the Hebrew Sarah, meaning "princess" or "noblewoman."

name: Maria
meaning: A Latin form of Mary, possibly meaning "beloved" or "bitter."

name: Alice
meaning: From the Germanic Adalheidis, meaning "noble kind."

name: Julia
meaning: From the Roman family name Julius, often linked to "youthful."

name: Catherine
meaning: From the Greek Aikaterine, traditionally linked to katharos, "pure."

name: Diana
meaning: The Roman goddess of the moon and hunt; possibly "divine."

name: Eva
meaning: A form of Eve, from the Hebrew Chavah, meaning "life."

name: Lucy
meaning: From the Latin lux, meaning "light."

name: Maya
meaning: Linked to the Roman goddess Maia; also "water" in Hebrew.

name: Stella
meaning: From the Latin stella, meaning "star."

name: Bella
meaning: From the Italian bella, "beautiful"; also short for Isabella.

name: Claire
meaning: From the Latin clarus, meaning "clear" or "bright."

name: Audrey
meaning: From the Old English Æðelþryð, meaning "noble strength."

name: Natalie
meaning: From the Latin natalis, "birthday" — linked to Christmas.

name: Rose
meaning: From the flower; also from a Germanic word for "fame."

name: Sophie
meaning: A French form of Sophia, meaning "wisdom."

name: Vivian
meaning: From the Latin vivus, meaning "alive."

name: Margaret
meaning: From the Greek margarites, meaning "pearl."

name: Daisy
meaning: From the flower; from Old English "day's eye."

name: Kate
meaning: A short form of Katherine, traditionally linked to "pure."

name: Jasmine
meaning: From the Persian yasamin, the fragrant jasmine flower.

name: Eleanor
meaning: An Old French name of uncertain meaning, long borne by queens.

name: Rachel
meaning: From the Hebrew Rachel, meaning "ewe" — a symbol of gentleness.

name: Naomi
meaning: From the Hebrew No'omi, meaning "pleasantness."

name: Ruby
meaning: From the gemstone, via the Latin rubeus, "red."

name: Leah
meaning: From the Hebrew Le'ah, possibly meaning "weary" or "delicate."

name: Caroline
meaning: A feminine form of Charles, meaning "free man."

name: Mason
meaning: An occupational surname meaning "stoneworker."

name: Logan
meaning: From a Scottish surname meaning "little hollow."

name: Aiden
meaning: From the Irish Aodhán, meaning "little fire."

name: Jackson
meaning: A surname meaning "son of Jack."

name: Carter
meaning: An occupational surname for one who transports goods by cart.

name: Luke
meaning: From Loukas, "man from Lucania"; related to "light."

name: Julian
meaning: From the Roman family name Julius, often linked to "youthful."

name: Levi
meaning: From the Hebrew Levi, meaning "joined" or "attached."

name: Andrew
meaning: From the Greek Andreas, meaning "manly" or "brave."

name: Joshua
meaning: From the Hebrew Yehoshua, meaning "the Lord is salvation."

name: Christopher
meaning: From the Greek Christophoros, "bearer of Christ."

name: Charles
meaning: From the Germanic karl, meaning "free man."

name: Ryan
meaning: From the Irish Ó Riain, often linked to "little king."

name: Aaron
meaning: From the Hebrew Aharon, possibly meaning "high mountain."

name: Eli
meaning: From the Hebrew Eli, meaning "ascent" or "my God."

name: Hunter
meaning: An occupational surname meaning "one who hunts."

name: Connor
meaning: From the Irish Conchobhar, meaning "lover of hounds."

name: Cameron
meaning: From a Scottish surname meaning "crooked nose."

name: Adrian
meaning: From Hadrianus, "from Hadria," a town in northern Italy.

name: Nicholas
meaning: From the Greek Nikolaos, meaning "victory of the people."

name: Dominic
meaning: From the Latin dominicus, meaning "belonging to the Lord."

name: Xavier
meaning: From a Basque place name meaning "new house."

name: Robert
meaning: From the Germanic hrod (fame) and beraht (bright): "bright fame."

name: George
meaning: From the Greek georgos, meaning "farmer" or "earth-worker."

name: Edward
meaning: From the Old English ead (wealth) and weard (guard): "rich guardian."

name: Richard
meaning: From the Germanic ric (ruler) and hard (brave): "brave ruler."

name: Peter
meaning: From the Greek petros, meaning "stone" or "rock."

name: Anthony
meaning: From the Roman family name Antonius, of uncertain meaning.

name: Paul
meaning: From the Latin paulus, meaning "small" or "humble."

name: Kevin
meaning: From the Irish Caoimhín, meaning "handsome" or "gentle birth."

name: Justin
meaning: From the Latin justus, meaning "just" or "fair."

name: Eric
meaning: From the Old Norse for "ever-ruler" or "eternal king."

name: Tyler
meaning: An occupational surname meaning "tile maker or layer."

name: Max
meaning: A short form of Maximilian, from maximus, "greatest."

name: Patrick
meaning: From the Latin patricius, meaning "nobleman."

name: Mark
meaning: From the Roman name Marcus, linked to Mars, god of war.

name: Steven
meaning: From the Greek Stephanos, meaning "crown" or "garland."

name: Brian
meaning: An Irish name possibly meaning "noble" or "high."

name: Ian
meaning: A Scottish form of John, meaning "God is gracious."

name: Jason
meaning: From the Greek Iason, meaning "healer."

name: Simon
meaning: From the Hebrew Shimon, meaning "he has heard."

name: Luna
meaning: From the Latin luna, "moon" — the Roman goddess of the moon.

name: Penelope
meaning: From the Greek Penelopeia; faithful wife of Odysseus in Homer's Odyssey.

name: Aria
meaning: From the Italian aria, "melody" or "air" — a solo vocal composition in opera.

name: Ellie
meaning: A short form of Eleanor or Ellen, ultimately meaning "light" or "sun."

name: Piper
meaning: An occupational surname meaning "flute player" or "pipe player."

name: Quinn
meaning: From the Irish Ó Cuinn, meaning "descendant of Conn" (counsel).

name: Skylar
meaning: An anglicized form of the Dutch Schuyler, meaning "scholar."

name: Brooke
meaning: From a place name for a person living near a brook or stream.

name: Paige
meaning: From the medieval occupational name for a young servant or attendant.

name: Layla
meaning: From the Arabic layla, meaning "night" — evoked in the classic Arabic love poem Layla and Majnun.

name: Riley
meaning: From the Irish Ó Raghallaigh, meaning "courageous" or "valiant."

name: Savannah
meaning: From the Spanish sabana, a treeless plain; also a historic city in Georgia.

name: Nicole
meaning: A French feminine form of Nicholas, meaning "victory of the people."

name: Lauren
meaning: A feminine form of Laurence, meaning "from Laurentum" — associated with the laurel tree.

name: Jessica
meaning: Coined by Shakespeare in The Merchant of Venice, possibly from the Hebrew Yiskah, "God beholds."

name: Rebecca
meaning: From the Hebrew Rivkah, traditionally linked to "to bind" — perhaps "captivating."

name: Amanda
meaning: From the Latin amandus, "worthy of love" — a gerundive form of amare, to love.

name: Stephanie
meaning: A feminine form of Stephen, from the Greek stephanos, "crown" or "garland."

name: Samantha
meaning: Of debated origin; possibly a blend of Samuel and Anthea, meaning "listener" or "listener of God."

name: Megan
meaning: A Welsh diminutive of Margaret, meaning "pearl."

name: Holly
meaning: From the holly tree, associated with Christmas and good fortune.

name: Jennifer
meaning: The Cornish/Welsh form of Guinevere, possibly meaning "white phantom" or "fair one."

name: Melissa
meaning: From the Greek melissa, meaning "bee" or "honey bee."

name: Ashley
meaning: From an English place name meaning "ash tree clearing."

name: Christina
meaning: A Latin feminine form of Christian, meaning "follower of Christ."

name: Kimberly
meaning: From the South African city name; ultimately from an Old English place name meaning "royal forest."

name: Sandra
meaning: A short form of Alexandra, meaning "defender of men."

name: Patricia
meaning: A feminine form of Patrick, from the Latin patricius, "nobleman."

name: Barbara
meaning: From the Greek barbaros, meaning "foreign" or "stranger" — an ancient epithet for non-Greek speakers.

name: Linda
meaning: From the Spanish linda, "pretty" or "beautiful."

name: Donna
meaning: From the Italian donna, "woman" or "lady."

name: Shirley
meaning: From an English place name meaning "bright clearing."

name: Betty
meaning: A pet form of Elizabeth, meaning "God is my oath."

name: Dorothy
meaning: From the Greek Dorothea, a reversal of Theodora: "gift of God."

name: Ruth
meaning: From the Hebrew Ruth, meaning "companion" or "friend."

name: Fiona
meaning: From the Gaelic fionn, meaning "white" or "fair" — coined by poet James Macpherson.

name: Gwendolyn
meaning: From the Welsh gwen (white, fair) and dolyn (ring or bow): "white ring."

name: Arabella
meaning: Of uncertain origin; possibly from the Latin orabilis, "yielding to prayer."

name: Adelaide
meaning: From the Germanic Adalheidis, meaning "noble kind."

name: Genevieve
meaning: From a Gaulish name possibly meaning "tribe woman" — patron saint of Paris.

name: Rosalind
meaning: From the Germanic hros (horse) and lind (gentle): "gentle horse" — popularized by Shakespeare.

name: Ivy
meaning: From the climbing plant, a symbol of fidelity and friendship.

name: Willow
meaning: From the willow tree, associated with grace, flexibility, and melancholy.

name: Iris
meaning: From the Greek iris, "rainbow" — the Greek goddess of the rainbow.

name: Freya
meaning: From the Old Norse Freyja, meaning "lady" — the Norse goddess of love and fertility.

name: Eloise
meaning: Of uncertain Germanic origin; famous bearer: Héloïse d'Argenteuil, the medieval scholar and lover of Abelard.

name: Helena
meaning: A Latinized form of Helen, from the Greek helene, meaning "torch" or "bright light."

name: Cecilia
meaning: From the Roman family name Caecilius; patron saint of music.

name: Frances
meaning: A feminine form of Francis, from the Latin Franciscus, "from France" or "free man."

name: Virginia
meaning: From the Roman family name Virginius, linked to the Latin virgo, "maiden."

name: Agnes
meaning: From the Greek hagnos, meaning "pure" or "holy."

name: Beatrice
meaning: From the Latin beatrix, "she who brings happiness" — immortalized by Dante as his guide through Paradise.

name: Matilda
meaning: From the Germanic maht (strength) and hild (battle): "mighty in battle."

name: Florence
meaning: From the Latin florens, "flourishing" — made famous by nursing pioneer Florence Nightingale.

name: Harriet
meaning: An English form of Henriette, meaning "home ruler."

name: Josephine
meaning: A French feminine form of Joseph, meaning "God will increase."

name: Constance
meaning: From the Latin constantia, meaning "constancy" or "steadfastness."

name: Millicent
meaning: From the Germanic amal (work) and swind (strength): "strong worker."

name: Winifred
meaning: From the Welsh Gwenfrewi, meaning "blessed reconciliation" or "white wave."

name: Cordelia
meaning: Of uncertain Celtic origin; Shakespeare's virtuous daughter of King Lear.

name: Matthew
meaning: From the Hebrew Mattityahu, meaning "gift of God."

name: Caleb
meaning: From the Hebrew Kalev, meaning "dog" or "whole-hearted" — one of the two faithful spies in the Bible.

name: Zachary
meaning: From the Hebrew Zekharyah, meaning "God has remembered."

name: Dylan
meaning: From the Welsh Dylan, meaning "great tide" or "born from the ocean."

name: Blake
meaning: From an Old English surname meaning either "black" (dark-haired) or "pale."

name: Jordan
meaning: From the Hebrew Yarden, "to flow down" — the name of the river in the Holy Land.

name: Gregory
meaning: From the Greek Gregorios, meaning "watchful" or "alert."

name: Lawrence
meaning: From Laurentius, "man from Laurentum" — a city associated with the laurel tree.

name: Leonard
meaning: From the Germanic leo (lion) and hard (brave): "brave lion."

name: Martin
meaning: From the Latin Martinus, derived from Mars, the Roman god of war.

name: Miles
meaning: From the Latin miles, "soldier," or a Germanic root meaning "gracious."

name: Frederick
meaning: From the Germanic fred (peace) and ric (ruler): "peaceful ruler."

name: Philip
meaning: From the Greek Philippos, meaning "friend of horses."

name: Raymond
meaning: From the Germanic ragin (counsel) and mund (protector): "wise protector."

name: Roger
meaning: From the Germanic hrod (fame) and ger (spear): "famous spear."

name: Ronald
meaning: A Scottish form of the Old Norse Rögnvaldr, meaning "ruler's counselor."

name: Russell
meaning: From a Norman French surname meaning "little red-haired one."

name: Scott
meaning: From a surname originally denoting someone from Scotland.

name: Sean
meaning: The Irish form of John, meaning "God is gracious."

name: Stephen
meaning: From the Greek Stephanos, meaning "crown" or "garland."

name: Timothy
meaning: From the Greek Timotheos, meaning "honoring God."

name: Travis
meaning: From an Old French surname for a toll-bridge collector, from traverser, "to cross."

name: Trevor
meaning: From the Welsh tref (homestead) and mawr (large): "large settlement."

name: Wesley
meaning: From an English place name meaning "west meadow" — associated with the Methodist founder John Wesley.

name: Wyatt
meaning: From a medieval English surname derived from the Germanic wig (war) and heard (brave).

name: Derek
meaning: A short form of Theodoric, meaning "ruler of the people."

name: Grant
meaning: From a Scottish surname, from the Old French grand, "great."

name: Harold
meaning: From the Old Norse Haraldr, meaning "army ruler."

name: Jeffrey
meaning: A variant of Geoffrey, from Germanic elements for "peace" and "territory."

name: Joel
meaning: From the Hebrew Yo'el, meaning "God is willing" or "Yahweh is God."

name: Kenneth
meaning: From the Gaelic Cináed or Cainnech, meaning "born of fire" or "handsome."

name: Louis
meaning: A French form of Ludwig, from the Germanic hludwig (fame) and wig (war): "renowned warrior."

name: Maxwell
meaning: From a Scottish place name meaning "Mack's stream."

name: Mitchell
meaning: An English form of Michael, meaning "who is like God?"

name: Norman
meaning: From the Germanic nord (north) and man (man): "northman" — applied to the Norse settlers of Normandy.

name: Spencer
meaning: An occupational surname for a household steward who dispensed provisions.

name: Stuart
meaning: An occupational surname meaning "steward" or "household manager."

name: Troy
meaning: From the ancient city of Troy; also an Irish surname from the Norman de Troyes.

name: Wayne
meaning: From an Old English occupational surname meaning "wagon maker" or "cart driver."

name: Jonathan
meaning: From the Hebrew Yonatan, meaning "God has given."

name: Dennis
meaning: From Dionysius, the Greek god of wine and festivity.

name: Donald
meaning: From the Gaelic Domhnall, meaning "world ruler" or "ruler of the world."

name: Frank
meaning: From the name of the Frankish people, meaning "free man."

name: Gary
meaning: A variant of Gerald, from the Germanic ger (spear).

name: Gerald
meaning: From the Germanic ger (spear) and wald (rule): "ruler with a spear."

name: Lance
meaning: From the Germanic lanzo, "land"; also a diminutive of Lancelot.

name: Marcus
meaning: A Latin form of Mark, linked to the Roman god Mars.

name: Neil
meaning: From the Irish Niall, possibly meaning "champion" or "cloud."

name: Nigel
meaning: A medieval Latinization of Neil, from the Latin nigellus, "dark."

name: Roland
meaning: From the Germanic hrod (fame) and land (land): "famous land" — legendary hero of the Frankish Empire.

name: Stanley
meaning: From an English place name meaning "stony meadow."

name: Warren
meaning: From a Norman French place name meaning "game park" or "rabbit warren."

name: Finn
meaning: From the Irish fionn, meaning "fair" or "white" — the legendary Irish hero Fionn mac Cumhaill.

name: Declan
meaning: From the Irish Deaglán, an early Irish saint's name of uncertain meaning.

name: Rowan
meaning: From the Gaelic ruadhán, meaning "little red one"; also from the rowan tree.

name: Tobias
meaning: From the Hebrew Toviyah, meaning "God is good."

name: Felix
meaning: From the Latin felix, meaning "happy" or "fortunate."

name: Hugo
meaning: From the Germanic hug, meaning "heart," "mind," or "spirit."

name: Otto
meaning: From the Germanic aud, meaning "wealth" or "fortune."

name: Oscar
meaning: From the Old Norse Ásgeirr or the Irish Oisín; possible meaning "deer friend" or "divine spear."

name: Vincent
meaning: From the Latin Vincentius, from vincere, "to conquer."

name: Victor
meaning: From the Latin victor, meaning "conqueror" or "winner."

name: Walter
meaning: From the Germanic waldan (rule) and heri (army): "ruler of the army."

name: Reginald
meaning: From the Germanic ragin (counsel) and wald (rule): "wise ruler."

name: Edmund
meaning: From the Old English ead (wealth) and mund (protection): "wealthy protector."
